description: This file defines FastAPI route handlers for managing recipe reviews in a cooking application. It includes endpoints for listing reviews for a recipe, adding a new review with moderation status, and deleting a user's own review.

classes.name: APIRouter
classes.description: FastAPI router instance used to register route handlers.

methods.name: list_reviews(recipe_id: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Fetches and returns published reviews for a specific recipe, sorted by creation date in descending order.

methods.name: add_review( recipe_id: str, body: ReviewCreateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Creates a new review with 'pending' status for moderation, associated with a specific recipe, and handles integrity errors if the review already exists.

methods.name: delete_my_review(review_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session))
methods.description: Deletes the current user's review for a recipe if it exists and belongs to the user.

ctags.name: add_review
ctags.signature: ( recipe_id: str, body: ReviewCreateRequest, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: delete_my_review
ctags.pattern: /^def delete_my_review(review_id: str, user=Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_d/
